diagnosis: Playbook passes --query-domain but the registry ParamDef for 'domain' had no aliases; the CLI rejected the unknown option

files_changed.description: Added aliases=("--query-domain",) to the 'domain' ParamDef in the dns-amplification registry entry so the CLI accepts --query-domain as an alternative to --domain

notes: registry.py is pure Python metadata consumed at runtime by the CLI factory; no Docker image rebuild is required — the fix takes effect immediately on the next matcha invocation.
